title: oldenlandia beddomei
intro: Oldenlandia beddomei, also known as Beddome's Oldenlandia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is an herbaceous perennial plant that is native to the Western Ghats region of India and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia beddomei is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting overall well-being.
